subLocations.name: Sanubia Desert West
subLocations.prose: Split from the main group. The Mercury Crest is in a shifting sand pit in the west — look for the swirling ground texture. Primer XVI is under ruins nearby.

subLocations.name: Sanubia Desert East
subLocations.prose: Primer XVII is near the signpost. Several chests contain Al Bhed Potions and equipment throughout both desert sections.
